detectors.description:
Reentrancy in AAProject._assignClaims(address,address,uint256,address) (src/contracts/AAProject.sol#144-154):

	- IERC20(_tokenAddress).transfer(_beneficiary,_tokenAssigned) (src/contracts/AAProject.sol#151)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- benTokens[_beneficiary] = benTokens[_beneficiary] - _tokenAssigned (src/contracts/AAProject.sol#152)
	AAProject.benTokens (src/contracts/AAProject.sol#53) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- AAProject._assignClaims(address,address,uint256,address) (src/contracts/AAProject.sol#144-154)
	- AAProject.assignTokenToBeneficiary(address,uint256) (src/contracts/AAProject.sol#102-114)
	- AAProject.benTokens (src/contracts/AAProject.sol#53)
	- AAProject.totalClaimsAssigned() (src/contracts/AAProject.sol#118-122)
	- AAProject.transferTokenToVendor(address,address,uint256) (src/contracts/AAProject.sol#161-176)
	- AAProject.transferTokenToVendorForCashToken(address,address,address,uint256) (src/contracts/AAProject.sol#178-195)
